## Decisions
- Codex should act as architect/reviewer and follow the checkpoint protocol; do not patch product code during checkpoint reviews unless the user explicitly asks.
- Validation should include `pnpm astro check`, `pnpm build`, and visual QA evidence; if live agent-browser QA is unavailable, say so explicitly.
- Theme system intent is 3 family buttons only: `Coffee`, `Catppuccin`, `Classic`, each toggling within its own light/dark pair.
- The old Codex-created mock page is no longer needed and was removed to reduce clutter.
